headlines.headline: Orevex Renewables launches next-generation data analytics platform

sentiment.reasoning: The launch of a new platform is a positive product development that may drive future revenue growth.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
